query:
-- 查询所有老师角色的用户及其城市数据
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.nickname,
  u.phone,
  u.roles,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT urc.cityName SEPARATOR '; ') AS cities
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN user_role_cities urc ON u.id = urc.userId AND urc.role = '老师'
WHERE u.roles LIKE '%老师%'
  AND u.deletedAt IS NULL
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.nickname, u.phone, u.roles
ORDER BY u.id;
